ValidationRule.description: VR-003: Blocks save when NEPA waiver is invoked without a statutory citation. Agencies lose cases by asserting waivers without valid legal authority. OGC memo must be in the administrative record.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: NEPA waiver is checked but no statutory citation is provided. Enter the specific statutory provision authorizing the waiver (e.g., IIRIRA Section 102(c); EPAct 2005 Section 390). Attach an OGC legal sufficiency memo before advancing.
